title: Interactive demo — W-4, I-9, DS-160
description: The demo page now includes W-4, I-9, and DS-160 sample forms so you can try FormPilot before signing up. Switch between forms with one click.

title: Form guide pages
description: Dedicated pages for common form types (W-4, I-9, 1040, DS-160, N-400) explain what each form is and what to expect. Share with anyone who needs help.

title: Completion certificate
description: When you finish filling a form, FormPilot generates a signed completion certificate PDF. Useful for your records or to show proof of completion.

title: Field notes
description: Annotate any form field with a private note — reminders like 'check W-2 box 1 before submitting' that persist across sessions.

title: Editable form memory
description: Form memory entries are now editable inline. Click any saved value to correct it — no need to re-upload the form.

title: Chrome extension
description: The FormPilot Chrome extension detects web form fields on any page and shows AI explanations in a side panel. Install it from the Extension page.
